# Course Title
Practical AI Foundations for Teams

# Course Description
An applied introduction to AI concepts, workflows, governance, and evaluation for real-world teams.

# Overview
This course introduces learners to core AI concepts, safe implementation patterns, and practical team adoption plans.

# Lesson 1: AI Fundamentals
Define AI, machine learning, and generative AI. Explain model training, inference, and common misconceptions.

# Lesson 2: AI Operations and Governance
Cover prompt/version governance, data handling controls, role responsibilities, and risk management.

# Lesson 3: Measuring AI Outcomes
Define quality metrics, user-journey outcomes, and iterative improvement loops.

# Key Takeaways
AI initiatives succeed when teams combine technical capability, governance, and measurable operational outcomes.
